name: Heartbeat detection with radar - Henrik's Blog
snippet: Phase of the radar baseband signal is very sensitive to movement allowing to detect small movements caused by breathing and heartbeat.

name: Breathing and heartbeat influence perception
snippet: Breathing has a similar impact on visual perception, with the same delay when the image appears during exhalation rather than inhalation.

name: I feel like a bobblehead with my pulse/heartbeat. Anyone else ever get this feeling? - Reddit
snippet: I can feel my pulse/blood flow/heartbeat. It isn't pounding or going too fast or too slow or missing beats or anything like that.

name: Feeling the subtle currents of presence and inner healing - Facebook

name: Did you know your brain gently pulsates with each heartbeat? Now, a group of researchers
snippet: Your brain gently pulsates with each heartbeat. Now, a group of researchers have developed an imaging method that shows the organ in motion.

name: Ever Wondered What Your Heartbeat Looks Like Under the Microscope? Prepare to be
snippet: The rhythmic dance of your heart captured at a microscopic level reveals the intricate movements that keep you alive.

name: Magnifying the Brain in Motion with Every Heartbeat - Neuroscience News
